paragraph.heading: Collection.—
paragraph.content: The term “collection” means a collection of intellectual and cultural artifacts, including documents, sculpture, and works of art.

paragraph.heading: Eligible entity.—
paragraph.content: The term “eligible entity” means a Federal entity, State, local, or tribal government, educational institution, or nonprofit organization.

paragraph.heading: Historic property.—
paragraph.content: The term “historic property” has the meaning given the term in section 300308 of this title.

paragraph.heading: Nationally significant.—
paragraph.content: The term “nationally significant”, in reference to a collection or historic property, means a collection or historic property that meets the applicable criteria for national significance, in accordance with regulations promulgated by the Secretary pursuant to section 302103 of this title.

paragraph.heading: Program.—
paragraph.content: The term “program” means the Save America’s Treasures Program established under section 308902(a) of this title.

paragraph.heading: Secretary.—
paragraph.content: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary, acting through the Director.

html:tr.style: font-size:6pt; border-bottom:1px solid black; border-top:1px solid black; -uslm-lc:h1;

html:th.style: min-width: 44.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-right:1px solid black;
width:68.0pt ; max-width:68.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black;
width:94.0pt ; max-width:94.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-left:1px solid black;

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: Pub. L. 111–11, title VII, subtitle D, § 7303(b), Mar. 30, 2009, 123 Stat. 1216.

note.p: In paragraph (4), the words “in reference to a collection or historic property” are added for clarity.
